meaning: vt.收回,撤消vi.缩回,退出v.撤退
examples: A back injury forced her to withdraw from Wimbledon.
There have been calls for Britain to withdraw from the EU.
He refused to withdraw derogatory remarks made about his boss.
Unlike depositors, these investors could not withdraw their funds on demand whenever bad news surfaced.
The experienced James Hickman, the 200m butterfly world champion, has been forced to withdraw with a shoulder injury.
